summary: Focused on crypto trading platforms and tooling, embedded firmware for HID devices, and AI/ML research. Also worked on Windows utilities, Android apps, and developer tooling.

items.title: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Built a Windows kernel input filter driver for capturing and injecting keyboard and mouse events.

items.title: Crypto trading platform development
items.description: Worked on the SaaS crypto trading platform, focusing on infrastructure, UI, and deployment.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Developed firmware for ESP32-S3 based HID emulation device.

items.title: File tagging utility for Windows
items.description: Iterated on the Windows Explorer file tagging tool, including release pipeline and store publishing.

items.title: ESP32-S3 HID firmware updates
items.description: Continued development of the ESP32-S3 HID firmware with new hardware variants.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted research on crypto price prediction models, experimenting with various architectures.

items.title: On-device AI assistant for Android
items.description: Built an Android LLM assistant with on-device model support and tool use.

items.title: File tagging utility release engineering
items.description: Polished the Windows file tagging utility, focusing on CI/CD and store publishing.

items.title: HID firmware maintenance
items.description: Maintained the ESP32-S3 HID firmware, fixing connectivity issues.

items.title: Poker computer vision system
items.description: Developed a computer vision system for analyzing online poker games.

items.title: HID firmware feature expansion
items.description: Worked on the ESP32-S3 HID firmware, adding new device variants and features.

items.title: Freqtrade Telegram bot
items.description: Built a Telegram bot for managing Freqtrade crypto trading instances.

items.title: Trading strategy development
items.description: Developed and optimized trading strategies and monitoring tools for Freqtrade.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy development
items.description: Developed and backtested trading strategies for the Freqtrade platform.

items.title: Crypto signaler bot
items.description: Created a Telegram bot for crypto trading signals using AI analysis.
